name: Aloe Vera

claimMap.claim: v10.4: Aloe has metabolic meta-analysis evidence, but safety/product distinction between gel/extract and latex is critical.
claimMap.notes: v10.4: Aloe has metabolic meta-analysis evidence, but safety/product distinction between gel/extract and latex is critical.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Aloe gel/extract dosing is product-specific; avoid anthraquinone/laxative aloe latex confusion

claimMap.claim: v8.2: A meta-analysis of five RCTs reported improvements in FBG, HbA1c, and lipids in prediabetes/early untreated diabetes.
claimMap.notes: v8.2: A meta-analysis of five RCTs reported improvements in FBG, HbA1c, and lipids in prediabetes/early untreated diabetes.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: product-specific aloe gel/extract dosing varies; avoid anthraquinone laxative confusion

safety: Generally well tolerated for most users.
dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Inner leaf gel for topical/digestive products and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Inner leaf gel for topical/digestive products and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
